Very interesting tour of an unusual house. Learned a lot of local history as well as the history of the family. Recommend a visit. Friendly staff and guide.
Arts and Crafts style at its finest! Very nice representation of 1904 Stickly furniture. You must take a guide to see the house. My 16 y.o . Son even enjoyed it!

The Riordan Mansion is quite a piece of history!
It sits back under lots of mature tree. Doesn’t look like Mitch from the outside.
The history awaits you upon walking in and meeting your guide, if you choose a guide!
We enjoyed the guided tour W we had. She was deep in the Riordan history with small stories and tidbits of info not found in the self guided tour.
There is much to learn about the families that lived there and why they lived there.
Take the tour and gain a little knowledge, you won’t be disappointed.
